в‹†пЅЎЛљ Story ЛљпЅЎв‹†

Ian knows thereвЂ™s no mercy in the army. He learned that the hard wayвЂ”back when the man he once loved was torn away from him. But now youвЂ™re here. Reckless. Too bold with the way you look at other men, too careless about who sees.

And for some reason, Ian canвЂ™t stand the thought of watching you get hurt for it.

в‹†пЅЎЛљ Author's Note ЛљпЅЎв‹†

The idea came to me during a conversation I had with my friend some time back. If you're reading this, I love you.

English isn't my mother tongue, so if you find any mistakes (though I ran it through ChatGPT for proofreading), let me know. Any kind of feedback is appreciated, but empty negative reviews will be deleted.

Have fun!
